evaluators.name: Save Most Recently Updated 4K Streaming Requirements Article Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved the most recently updated 4K streaming requirements article in the TV streaming issues section, and optionally used an appropriate 4K streaming-quality search.

evaluators.name: Smart TV Buffering Support Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a Streaming quality support request from the smart TV buffering article using the fastest contact option and described buffering around 8 PM.

evaluators.name: Simpler Cancellation Article Marked Helpful Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user marked as helpful the cancellation article (web vs TV) that has fewer numbered instruction steps, based on new feedback created on or after 2026-03-03.

evaluators.name: Android Subtitles Article Saved and Viewed in Spanish Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the highest-rated Android subtitles/audio article and then viewed that same article in Spanish, using the instrumentation variable.

evaluators.name: Teen Maturity Article Saved and PIN Article Opened Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved an article about setting maturity ratings for teens and opened a related PIN restrictions article, using the instrumentation variable.

evaluators.name: Billing Country Set to United States via Payment Settings Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user updated the billing country in payment settings to United States.

evaluators.name: Standard Plan Download Articles Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved both the Standard-plan download devices article and the related article comparing download limits across plans, and whether they used downloads + Standard plan filters to find the main article.

evaluators.name: VC_201 Error Chat Started with Correct Error Code Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user started a support chat (or fastest option) for error VC_201 from the computer error article, ensuring the error code VC_201 is included in the support request.
